title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at K Raheja Corp

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at K Raheja Corp
jsonLd.description:
K Raheja Corp has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Allahabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About K Raheja Corp:
K Raheja Corp is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with K Raheja Corp!
